theme_strategy.description: Elite Athleticism & Precision. A command-center focus for high-stakes trading.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles and section headers. Tight tracking is mandatory.

body.usage: Use for UI labels, descriptions, and general text.

numbers.usage: MANDATORY for all financial data, prices, P&L, and dates.

typography.installation: Import these fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Chivo:wght@700;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;700&display=swap');

rules: Main Chart: col-span-2 row-span-2 or col-span-3
Use h-full on children to ensure stretch.
Floating Action Button (+) for new trade
Bottom Navigation Bar for sections (Dashboard, Journal, Analytics, AI)

cards.classes: bg-card/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-sm rounded-xl

primary.classes: bg-white text-black font-bold hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-lg h-12 px-6 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)] transition-all

secondary.classes: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-lg h-12 px-6 border border-white/5

accent.classes: bg-accent/10 text-accent border border-accent/20 hover:bg-accent/20 transition-all

inputs.classes: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-accent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent rounded-lg h-12 text-lg font-mono

charts.style: Minimalist, no grid lines (or very subtle), clear tooltips.

visual_enhancers.gradients: None over 20% opacity. Use subtle radial gradients for glows behind charts.
visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle noise overlay to the body background if possible.

interactions: Page Load: Staggered fade-in for grid items

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL framer-motion: `yarn add framer-motion` (It is missing in package.json)
Configure tailwind.config.js to use the 'class' strategy for dark mode and add the custom colors.
Add the font imports to src/index.css immediately.
Implement the 'Glass Card' style as a reusable component or utility class.
Use Recharts for all data visualization.
Ensure all numbers (prices, P&L) use the JetBrains Mono font.
For the Mobile View, ensure the bottom navigation bar is sticky and has a blur effect.
Do not ask the user for clarification. Use your best judgment based on this persona.

accessibility_critical: Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-accent).
Charts must use patterns or distinct shapes, not just color, for colorblind users.
testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (kebab-case).
